name: uacos-multi-repo-benchmark-example
description: Example benchmark profile for real repositories. Optional repos are skipped when not mounted locally, so this file is safe to keep in the repo but should be run only when the target repos exist.
method_notes: This manifest is for local real-repo evidence collection, not release-gate CI.
Mount or clone target repositories next to UACOS, then adjust repo_path if needed.
99% may only describe full-repo input-context reduction on measured tasks, not total AI workflow token savings.
Public claims require benchmarked repos, task pass-rate evidence, and no skipped-profile-only results.

tasks: improve benchmark claim policy without changing patch gate
validate simplified workflow docs and CLI behavior

quality_checks.task: improve benchmark claim policy without changing patch gate

tasks: trace animal event ingestion to map display and playback
validate admin and viewer separation for event workflow

quality_checks.task: trace animal event ingestion to map display and playback

tasks: trace 15 minute segment recording and upload retry behavior
validate local retention deletion only after successful upload

quality_checks.task: trace 15 minute segment recording and upload retry behavior

tasks: trace video-aware tunnel path selection and relay fallback
validate node doctor output for CGNAT and video QoS

quality_checks.task: trace video-aware tunnel path selection and relay fallback

tasks: trace AI Box RTSP forwarding and VMS channel allocation

quality_checks.task: trace AI Box RTSP forwarding and VMS channel allocation
